sections.heading: Topline and leverage
sections.body: Topline reached $48.2M in FY24, up 21% YoY. Net leverage held at 3.1x.

sections.heading: Assumption requiring review
sections.body: The base case assumes 4.0% churn, changed from 3.2%; confirm with the deal team before distribution.

sections.heading: Open review items
sections.body: Confirm churn assumption change, then approve the Outlook draft or shared-folder save.

redlines.label: Candidate memory rejected

redlines.after: Excluded from model context until user approves it.
